description: Multi-turn: update agent user_prompt -> delete agent (covers `neomind agent update` + `agent delete`; both previously uncovered).

turns.user: Update demo-agent's user_prompt to 'monitor temperature and alert'.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent resolves demo-agent's id then runs `neomind agent update <id> --user-prompt 'monitor temperature and alert'` (or PUT /api/agents/<id>)
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind agent delete <id>` (or DELETE /api/agents/<id>)
expectations.overall: Both turns must reuse the same id
